parts.text: Analyze errors in dev-vn environment for the last 2 hours
Investigate what hit prod last hour, focus on ERROR and CRITICAL severity
Check luz-baumer logs in dev-vn, what's failing?

property.description: The agent asks the user which GCP environment to investigate (dev-vn, dev, test, performance, or prod) BEFORE fetching any logs. Responding with a clarification question — without fetching logs or generating a report — is the CORRECT and expected behavior for this ambiguous request.
The agent does NOT attempt to fetch logs or guess an environment when the user's request contains no environment information. Proceeding without clarification would be an error.

parts.text: Show me WARNING level logs from test environment last 30 minutes
Analyze errors in staging environment last 1 hour
Show me CRITICAL logs from dev environment in the last 5 minutes
I'd be happy to investigate. Which environment should I check — dev-vn, dev, test, performance, or prod?

property.description: After the user says 'Check dev-vn', the agent correctly identifies dev-vn as the target environment, fetches logs from the klara-nonprod project, and produces a log analysis report. The agent does NOT ask for further clarification — it proceeds with the analysis.

The agent correctly identifies 'dev-vn' as the target environment and proceeds to fetch logs from the corresponding GCP project without asking for further clarification. The response includes a log analysis report or explains why logs could not be fetched.
